subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-Rida! Behold thou man as a sword: whilst in its sheath its essence remaineth hidden and concealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام رضا انسان را بمثابه سیف مشاهده نما تا در غلافست جوهر آن مستور و مکنون
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @symbolism, @goodly deeds; actions, @words vs deeds
